title: Activity Entry
description: Machine-readable shape of one line in working/activity.md. The markdown file is the canonical human-readable form; this schema documents how each line maps to structured fields for dashboard / tooling consumers.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp (the '## YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM' prefix in the markdown line)

mode.description: Optional mode marker for skills with sub-modes (e.g., 'pink', 'red', 'gold', 'white-glove' for red-team-review)

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of what happened

output_path.description: Path to the primary output file(s) produced by this invocation
